Error: authentication failed

The ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable is not set and no valid authentication configuration was found at ~/.claude/config.json.

Please authenticate using one of the following methods:

1. Set the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable:
   export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=your_api_key_here

2. Run the login command:
   claude login

For more information, visit: https://docs.anthropic.com/claude-code
